package com.consumer.x;

// Tier-2 reporter-declaration target. Sibling tier-2 fixtures name it via
// `// reporters: Tier2ReporterDecl.java.txt#InternalLog.logInternal`; javalint
// parses it only for its package (com.consumer.x), so a call site is matched on
// (package, Class, method). It carries no catch, so it reports nothing itself.
public class InternalLog {
    public static void logInternal(String msg, Throwable cause) {}
}
